skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI-powered video creation agent that produces short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions and uploaded assets.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate video production tool that connects to the Pexo AI video API. All static findings are false positives. The tool uses shell scripts for local operations (file upload, project management) and makes API calls to a single trusted endpoint (pexo.ai). Credentials are only used for authenticating with the Pexo service. No malicious behavior, data exfiltration, or privilege escalation detected.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Usage in Scripts
low_findings.description: Shell scripts use command substitution and external commands. Verified this is limited to calling the skill's own scripts (pexo-project-create.sh, pexo-upload.sh, pexo-chat.sh, pexo-project-get.sh, pexo-asset-get.sh) with hardcoded or validated arguments. No user-controlled command injection vectors found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: All shell script commands use hardcoded script names and validated arguments passed from the SKILL.md workflow. No eval() or dynamic command construction found.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API Endpoint
low_findings.description: Network requests are made to hardcoded pexo.ai domain. This is expected for a third-party API integration.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pexo is a legitimate video production service. All network traffic stays within the Pexo ecosystem. No calls to third-party or unknown endpoints.

low_findings.title: Config File Location
low_findings.description: Scripts read configuration from ~/.pexo/config. This is a standard pattern for developer tools.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Reading user config files from ~/.pexo/ is standard for CLI tools. No security risk as this is user-owned configuration.

low_findings.title: MD5 Hash Usage Flagged
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged MD5 usage as 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. MD5 is used for content hashing/caching (ETag headers). This is not a security vulnerability for the skill's purpose.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: MD5 for ETag/caching purposes does not create security risk in an API client tool context. Not used for password hashing or cryptographic operations.

dangerous_patterns.title: Heuristic Alert: Code Execution + Network + Credential Access
dangerous_patterns.description: Static analyzer flagged this as a dangerous combination. This is a false positive. The skill uses shell scripts (code execution) to call the Pexo API (network) using stored credentials (env_access) - this is the expected behavior of any API client tool. No malicious pattern detected.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: This combination is standard for legitimate API tools. All network calls go to a single trusted endpoint (pexo.ai). No data exfiltration, no command injection, no privilege escalation.

content.user_title: Create stunning AI videos in minutes
content.value_statement: Creating professional videos requires expensive equipment and expertise. Pexo Agent handles everything - scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music - so you can produce polished short videos from a simple description.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions
Upload reference images, videos, or audio to guide video generation
Interactive workflow with preview options and revision support
Deliver final videos with download URLs and project links
limitations: Cannot access URLs directly - files must be downloaded and uploaded manually
Video generation takes 15-20 minutes for short clips, longer for complex videos
Requires Pexo account with sufficient credits for video production
Cannot process web URLs or crawl external content

use_cases.title: Create product showcase videos
use_cases.description: Upload product photos and let the AI create engaging product advertisements with transitions and music.
use_cases.target_user: E-commerce sellers, marketers, small business owners

use_cases.title: Generate social media content
use_cases.description: Create TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts from text descriptions without video editing skills.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers, content creators, influencers

use_cases.title: Produce brand explainer videos
use_cases.description: Describe your product or service and receive a professional explainer video with proper pacing and visuals.

prompt_templates.title: Simple video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a 15-second video showing a sunset over the ocean with gentle waves

prompt_templates.title: Product showcase
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a product video for my handmade candles. Show the lighting process and the final glowing result with warm ambient music.
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate - product advertisement with specific requirements

prompt_templates.title: Upload reference image
prompt_templates.prompt: Here is my product photo <original-image>ASSET_ID</original-image>. Create a 30-second brand video that showcases this product in a luxury lifestyle setting.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - using uploaded assets with detailed direction

prompt_templates.title: Revise existing video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make the transitions smoother and add more upbeat music to the previous video
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced - requesting revisions on delivered content

output_examples.input: I want a 20-second product video for running shoes with energetic music
output_examples.output:
Your video is being created. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Track progress at: https://pexo.ai/project/{project_id}

[Video delivered with download URL and project page link]

output_examples.input: Create a brand video for my coffee shop <original-image>ASSET_ID</original-image>

best_practices: Be specific about video duration, mood, and style in your request
Upload reference images when you want the AI to match a specific look or product
Provide feedback after preview options to refine the final video
Check the project page periodically for updates during the 15-20 minute generation time
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters like resolution or codec - the AI handles this automatically
Avoid vague requests like 'make a good video' - specify what makes it good
Do not request multiple unrelated scenes in one prompt - create separate videos instead

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Short videos (5-15 seconds) typically take 15-20 minutes. Longer or more complex videos may take 30+ minutes.

faq.question: What aspect ratios are supported?
faq.answer: Pexo supports 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square) aspect ratios. Specify your preference in the request.

faq.question: Can I use my own images or videos?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload your files using the pexo-upload.sh script, then reference the asset ID in your message using tags like <original-image>ASSET_ID</original-image>.

faq.question: What file formats are supported for upload?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC.

faq.question: How do I get credits for video production?
faq.answer: Visit https://pexo.ai/home, click Credits in the top-right corner, then select Buy Credits or Extra Credits.

faq.question: Can I request revisions to the generated video?
faq.answer: Yes. After viewing the delivered video, provide feedback and the AI will generate a revised version using the same project.
